_comment: World Bank data importer configuration. Edit this file to change data sources, indicators, countries, thresholds, or output settings. No TypeScript knowledge required.

source._comment: API base URL and request parameters. Change baseUrl to swap to a different data provider.

indicators._comment: Map from our internal field name to the data provider's indicator code. Change codes to use different indicators or a different provider.

countries._comment: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes to include. Set mode to 'all' to fetch every country the API provides, or 'explicit' to use only the listed codes.

incomeGroupThresholds._comment: GNI per capita (Atlas method, current USD) thresholds for World Bank income classification. The World Bank updates these annually — adjust here when new thresholds are published.

giniIndex._comment: Gini data is sparse — many countries only report every few years. lookbackYears controls how far back to search for the most recent value. Set nullable to false to exclude countries without Gini data.

output._comment: Where and how to write the result. path is relative to this config file.

validation._comment: Rules the output must satisfy before it's written. If validation fails, countries.json is NOT overwritten.
